VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Validation Error
VALIDATION_ERROR.message: The input value is not valid.
solutions: Check the fields highlighted in red
Fill in all required fields

REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING.title: Required Field Missing
solutions: Fill in all fields marked with *

INVALID_FORMAT.title: Format Error
INVALID_FORMAT.message: The input format is not valid.
solutions: Management number: enter in XXX-XYYYY format
e.g. SUW-E0001 (Suwon), UIW-E0001 (Uiwang)

INVALID_DATE.title: Invalid Date
solutions: Use the date picker to select a valid date

DUPLICATE_ERROR.title: Duplicate Error
solutions: Use a different value or check existing data

DUPLICATE_MANAGEMENT_NUMBER.title: Duplicate Management Number
DUPLICATE_MANAGEMENT_NUMBER.message: This management number is already registered.
solutions: Use a different management number
Search the equipment list to find the existing entry

DUPLICATE_SERIAL_NUMBER.title: Duplicate Serial Number
DUPLICATE_SERIAL_NUMBER.message: This serial number is already registered.
solutions: Use a different serial number
It is recommended to check the existing equipment

VERSION_CONFLICT.title: Data Conflict
VERSION_CONFLICT.message: Another user has modified this data. Loading the latest data.
solutions: The page will refresh automatically
Please try again after the refresh

UNAUTHORIZED.title: Authentication Required
solutions: Please log in again

PERMISSION_DENIED.title: Permission Denied
PERMISSION_DENIED.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.
solutions: Check if you have permission for the relevant site/team
Contact the system administrator if you need permission

SESSION_EXPIRED.title: Session Expired
solutions: Please log in again

NOT_FOUND.title: Not Found
NOT_FOUND.message: The requested resource could not be found.
solutions: Check if the information is correct
It may have already been deleted

EQUIPMENT_NOT_FOUND.title: Equipment Not Found
EQUIPMENT_NOT_FOUND.message: The requested equipment could not be found.
solutions: Check if the equipment ID is correct
The equipment may have been deleted

SERVER_ERROR.title: Server Error
SERVER_ERROR.message: An error occurred on the server.
solutions: Please try again later
Contact the system administrator if the problem persists

NETWORK_ERROR.title: Network Error
solutions: Check your internet connection
Please try again later

TIMEOUT_ERROR.title: Request Timeout
solutions: Please try again later

FILE_TOO_LARGE.title: File Too Large
FILE_TOO_LARGE.message: The uploaded file size is too large.
solutions: Reduce the file size to 10MB or less
For PDFs, try compressing or splitting the file

INVALID_FILE_TYPE.title: Unsupported File Type
INVALID_FILE_TYPE.message: This file type is not allowed.
solutions: Only PDF, JPG, PNG, and Excel files can be uploaded

FILE_UPLOAD_FAILED.title: File Upload Failed
FILE_UPLOAD_FAILED.message: An error occurred while uploading the file.
solutions: Please try again later
Check that the file is not corrupted

HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.title: History Save Failed
HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.message: An error occurred while saving the history information.
solutions: Please try again later

CALIBRATION_SAVE_FAILED.title: Calibration History Save Failed
CALIBRATION_SAVE_FAILED.message: An error occurred while saving the calibration history.
solutions: Please try again later

LOCATION_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.title: Location History Save Failed
LOCATION_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.message: An error occurred while saving the location history.
solutions: Please try again later

MAINTENANCE_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.title: Maintenance History Save Failed
MAINTENANCE_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.message: An error occurred while saving the maintenance history.
solutions: Please try again later

INCIDENT_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.title: Incident History Save Failed
INCIDENT_HISTORY_SAVE_FAILED.message: An error occurred while saving the incident history.
solutions: Please try again later

UNKNOWN_ERROR.title: Unknown Error
solutions: Refresh the page and try again
Contact the system administrator if the problem persists
